name: Wilkin & Sons Tea Room
notes: Famous Tiptree jam tea room with dog-friendly outdoor seating.

name: Perrywood Garden Centre
notes: Sprawling garden centre; dogs welcome on leads, water bowls out front.

name: The Fox & Hounds
notes: Country pub with dogs welcome in the bar and garden.

name: Maldon Promenade Park
notes: Riverside promenade and park beside the Blackwater — lovely for a post-walk stroll.

name: The Blue Strawberry
notes: Relaxed café with a dog-friendly courtyard.

name: The Cricketers, Danbury
notes: Traditional village pub; dogs welcome by the fire.

name: West Mersea Beach
notes: Sandy and shingle beach; off-season dogs run free along the shore.

name: Notley Park Café
notes: Park café with outdoor tables and water bowls.
